$comment: Base harness settings deployed by setup-project-ai: permissions + a status line. The generator adds stack-specific Bash allow entries (pytest/npm/etc.) based on detection. HOOKS ARE NOT DEFINED HERE: the harness loop hooks (relay.md resume on SessionStart/PreCompact, end-of-session nudge + usage digest on Stop, auto-lint on Edit/Write) ship with the claudster plugin via plugin/hooks/hooks.json and auto-activate on install — defining them here too would double-fire and re-introduce machine-specific paths. The default loop is just a plan file + relay.md; there is no opt-in pipeline/MCP power-mode.
$comment_permissions: IMPORTANT: any entry in `ask` overrides bypassPermissions (yolo) mode and forces a prompt every time, even when the user has opted into no-prompts. Keep `ask` empty (or as minimal as possible) so bypassPermissions actually bypasses. `Bash(git push:*)` was moved out of `ask` into `allow` for exactly this reason — it was forcing a push prompt on every /ship under bypassPermissions.
